name: Retaliation After Work Injury Claim in Farmington

mainEntity.name: Can I get fired for filing slip and fall workers' comp in Farmington Utah?
mainEntity.text: Can I get fired for filing slip and fall workers' comp in Farmington Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No Utah law prohibits retaliation for comp claims. File complaint with Labor Commission if terminated post-filing.[7]

suggestedAnswer.text: Protected activity but subtle retaliation occurs. Document performance pre-injury. Wrongful termination suits possible alongside comp. Unions stronger protections. Local attorneys handle retaliation claims frequently.[7]

description: No Utah law prohibits retaliation for comp claims. File complaint with Labor Commission if terminated post-filing.[7]
